dimensions.evidence: Plan requires 5 tests; only 2 are partially present, 2 are missing entirely, and 1 is t.Skip — <40% of the deliverable is functional.
Diff touches only scorer_test.go with 49 new lines of test code; no unrelated churn or file modifications outside plan scope.
No existing tests deleted or weakened; no hard-coded expected values to force green; the t.Skip is honestly labeled.
Missing regression test (#3) and defaults-injection test (#4) leave gaps; incomplete N/A assertions on #1 reduce guard strength — no production code changed but test coverage is insufficient.

failureReasons: Only 2 of 5 plan-required tests have non-skipped implementations: TestScore_SupportedLanguage_StillWorks and TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected are entirely missing from the diff.
TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is a t.Skip() stub with zero assertions — plan requirement #5 is unimplemented.
TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits plan-required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions; only checks nil scores.
TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil-return shortcut rather than specifically asserting maintainability is NOT 0.95 as plan mandates.
